MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN HILL & ATTY. DANIEL STENSON, TEL. NO. (510) 588-1000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DONALD P. EICHHORN OF WILSON ELSER, TEL. NO. 625-9350 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT MAREN ENGINEERING CORPORATION.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MAREN ENGINEERING CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - The motion for summary judgment is denied and the motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issue 2 (manufacturing defect) and denied as to issues 1 and 3 (sophisticated user). As to manufacturing defect claim, plaintiff admits that the baler that caused his injury was no different from any other Maren Model 72 Automatic Baler. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff was a sophisticated user for purposes of the sophisticated user defense. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
